text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi and Pakistani Foreign Minister Dar today for the second day in a row after holding a call yesterday. they discussed regional developments and the ceasefire situation with Pakistan highlighting its ongoing efforts to end the war and establish regional peace, reaffirming readiness to continue consultations and mediation. Araghchi thanked Pakistan for its role in facilitating talks, while stressing Iran’s engagement in diplomacy to end the conflict. He also criticised recent U.S. actions, citing alleged ceasefire violations, threats to Iranian ports and vessels, and what he described as inconsistent and unreasonable demands. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐与巴基斯坦外交部长达尔继昨日通话后，今日连续第二天进行沟通。他们讨论了地区局势和停火情况，巴基斯坦强调其为结束战争和建立地区和平所做的持续努力，并重申愿意继续进行磋商和调解。阿拉格齐感谢巴基斯坦在促进会谈中发挥的作用，同时强调伊朗致力于通过外交手段结束冲突。他还批评了美国近期的行动，列举了所谓的停火违规行为、对伊朗港口和船只的威胁，以及他所描述的反复无常且不合理的要求。 @wfwitness

text: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ UAE regime has arrested a number of its own citizens on charges of ‘working for Iran’ and quickly labels them a ‘terrorist organization This Epstein coalition regime message to its own citizens: own the wrong books, attend the wrong prayers, speak the wrong truth, and you’re a terrorist. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 阿联酋政权以“为伊朗工作”为由逮捕了多名本国公民，并迅速将他们贴上“恐怖组织”的标签。这个爱泼斯坦联盟政权向其公民传达的信息是：读错书、参加错误的祈祷、说出错误的真相，你就是恐怖分子。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. president Trump told PBS News in a phone call that if the Iran ceasefire expires, “lots of bombs will start going off.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普在与PBS新闻的电话中表示，如果伊朗停火协议到期，“大量炸弹将开始爆炸。” @wfwitness

text_zh: 特朗普告诉PBS新闻，如果伊朗停火协议到期，“大量炸弹将开始爆炸。”

text: Open Source Intel Rahm Emanuel: "No more U.S. military aid, financial assistance from the taxpayers for Israel. You're a country like all other allies of ours, Japan, South Korea, the Brits, the Germans. You're going to pay full price; you can buy what you want, but you have to abide by the laws — that should be it." "No more U.S. taxpayer support... I was in the room when President Obama's largest assistance was under President Obama. We did the funding for the Iron Dome. But here, the days of taxpayer subsidizing Israel are over." "No more financial aid." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：拉姆·伊曼纽尔：“不再有美国纳税人的军事援助和财政支持给以色列。你们和其他盟友一样，比如日本、韩国、英国、德国。你们将支付全价；你们可以买你们想要的，但必须遵守法律——就该这样。”“不再有美国纳税人的支持……奥巴马总统任期内，我曾参与过最大规模的援助。我们为‘铁穹’系统提供了资金。但现在，纳税人补贴以色列的日子结束了。”“不再有财政援助。”推文

text: WarTranslated "CyberBoroshno" reports that five Russian ships were hit in Sevastopol Bay. According to the OSINT community, as a result of operations by the SBU's Special Operations Center "A" and the HUR's "Prymara" unit, not only were the "Yamal" and "Nikolay Filchenkov" damaged, but also the large landing ships "Azov" and "Olshansky", as well as the large reconnaissance ship "Slavutych". /1742466857/12837 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：“CyberBoroshno”报道称，五艘俄罗斯船只在塞瓦斯托波尔湾被击中。据开源情报社区称，由于乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）“A”特种作战中心和乌克兰国防部情报总局（HUR）“Prymara”部队的行动，不仅“亚马尔”号和“尼古拉·菲尔琴科夫”号受损，大型登陆舰“亚速”号和“奥尔尚斯基”号，以及大型侦察舰“斯拉武季奇”号也遭到破坏。 /1742466857/12837 推文

text: Faytuks News JD Vance, Witkoff and Kushner is en route to Pakistan for talks with Iran, Trump tells the New York Post in an interview tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：特朗普在接受《纽约邮报》采访时表示，万斯、威特科夫和库什纳正在前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行会谈的途中。推文

text: Open Source Intel For the last 2 days, Iranian state TV and the Foreign Ministry have said no talks are scheduled. Today, President Trump says his team is landing within hours. This is one of the most misaligned regimes we’ve seen in a long time. Whether talks happen or not, it shows how weak and divided the regime has become. Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman, Ismail Baghaei: We have no plans for the next round of negotiations https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046134169420341503/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：过去两天，伊朗官方媒体和外交部一直表示没有安排会谈。今天，特朗普总统说他的团队将在几小时内降落。这是我们很长一段时间以来见过的最不协调的政权之一。无论会谈是否发生，这都表明该政权已经变得多么虚弱和分裂。伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：我们没有下一轮谈判的计划 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046134169420341503/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender Speaking Sunday on CNN, U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright stated that Americans should not expect the current rise in gas prices, spurred by the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, to return to under $3.00 a gallon until later this year or potentially even 2027. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046224854475538645/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国能源部长克里斯·赖特周日在CNN上表示，美国人不应指望由中东持续冲突引发的当前汽油价格上涨会在今年晚些时候或甚至2027年之前回落到每加仑3.00美元以下。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046224854475538645/video/1 推文

Willing to meet with senior Iranian leaders if a breakthrough is achieved" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046223499081965624/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

text: OSINTdefender According to the New York Post, citing a conversation with U.S. President Donald J. Trump, in the coming hours, U.S. Vice President JD Vance, White House Special Envoy to the Middle East Steve Witkoff, and advisor Jared Kushner are set to arrive in Islamabad, Pakistan for last ditch talks with Iranian officials over the current situation in the Strait of Hormuz and the wider region. Per President Trump, in earlier interviews, these talks must merit some success or Iran will see the resumption of U.S. strikes against their nation. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据《纽约邮报》援引与美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普的谈话称，在接下来的几个小时内，美国副总统J.D.万斯、白宫中东特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和顾问贾里德·库什纳将抵达巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，就霍尔木兹海峡及更广泛地区的当前局势与伊朗官员进行最后关头的会谈。据特朗普总统在早些时候的采访中所述，这些会谈必须取得一定的成功，否则伊朗将面临美国对其国家恢复打击。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 IDF Radio: For the first time since the Lebanon ceasefire began, Hezbollah claimed responsibility for an attack on IDF forces, saying it detonated an IED against an armored convoy in southern Lebanon. The IDF confirmed an Israeli military vehicle was hit, with no casualties reported. Israel has not yet responded militarily or issued a public statement on the incident. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军电台：自黎巴嫩停火开始以来，真主党首次对袭击以色列国防军部队负责，称其在黎巴嫩南部引爆了一枚针对装甲车队的简易爆炸装置。以色列国防军证实一辆以色列军车被击中，没有人员伤亡报告。以色列尚未对此事件做出军事回应或发表公开声明。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 NYP: U.S. President Trump says that a negotiations delegation led by U.S. Vice President Vance will land in Islamabad in a matter of hours. Trump emphasized the urgency of the talks, saying that nobody is playing any games. However, uncertainty remains over Iran’s participation, with Tehran yet to confirm it will engage, raising questions over whether the talks can proceed as planned. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 《纽约邮报》：美国总统特朗普表示，由美国副总统万斯率领的谈判代表团将在数小时内抵达伊斯兰堡。特朗普强调了会谈的紧迫性，称没有人是在玩弄手段。然而，伊朗是否参与仍存在不确定性，德黑兰尚未确认是否会参与，这引发了人们对会谈能否按计划进行的质疑。 @wfwitness

text: Trump on Iran: We’re supposed to have the talks. So I would assume at this point nobody’s playing games. Source: New York Post
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：我们应该进行会谈。所以我认为在这一点上没有人是在玩弄手段。来源：纽约邮报

text: 🇺🇸 🤡 📈 📉 The US Government has begun refunding up to $166 billion in tariffs (over)charged under President Trump after the Supreme Court ruled the policy unlawful. ➡️ Beginning today, businesses can file claims through a new customs system. ➡️ Over 330,000 importers across 53 million shipments are expected to be eligible. ➡️ Once approved, refunds plus interest will be paid within 60 to 90 days. 🐻 What about the damages? And businesses that went bankrupt already, O Glorious Exceptional Empire of Lies and Market manipulation? And how will the Average Joes and Karens, who paid for this all out of their pocket, get reimbursed? 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🤡 📈 📉 美国政府已开始退还特朗普总统任期内超收的最高达1660亿美元的关税，此前最高法院裁定该政策不合法。➡️ 从今天开始，企业可以通过新的海关系统提交索赔。➡️ 预计有超过33万家进口商、5300万批货物符合资格。➡️ 一旦获得批准，退款及利息将在60至90天内支付。🐻 损失怎么办？那些已经破产的企业怎么办，哦，光荣卓越的谎言与市场操纵帝国？那些自掏腰包支付这一切的普通民众和凯伦们又该如何获得补偿？🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: In Islamabad, ongoing U.S.–Iran talks could lead to a direct meeting between Trump and Iranian leaders. Trump signaled clear openness to that possibility, saying, “I have no problem meeting them.” Source: New York Post
text_zh: 在伊斯兰堡，正在进行的美国与伊朗会谈可能促成特朗普与伊朗领导人之间的直接会面。特朗普对这种可能性表现出了明确的开放态度，称：“我与他们会面没有问题。”来源：纽约邮报

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Iran announces flights to and from Imam Khomeini International Airport and Mehrabad Airport will resume starting today. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）最新消息 🔴 伊朗宣布，往返伊玛目霍梅尼国际机场和梅赫拉巴德机场的航班从今天起恢复。推文

text: Open Source Intel ICYMI, Reuters reports Pakistan is pushing President Trump to open the naval blockade so talks can move forward. According to the report, President Trump said he would consider it. This has not been confirmed by the Trump administration. Hard to see President Trump lifting the blockade right now. It is the only leverage that is clearly working, especially as pressure builds and IRGC salaries start drying up. If you are going to open it, do it in 4 weeks, not now. If this is true, then maybe a miracle is happening behind the scenes and the regime is actually ready to give up its nukes and other concessions. We will see. An Iranian senior official told Reuters: "Pakistan is promoting positive efforts to end the American blockade and ensure Iran's participation in the talks. Iran is seriously considering participating in the peace talks with the US, but no final decision has yet been made." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）如果你错过了，路透社报道称巴基斯坦正在敦促特朗普总统开放海上封锁，以便会谈能够推进。据报道，特朗普总统表示会考虑。这一点尚未得到特朗普政府的证实。很难想象特朗普总统现在会解除封锁。这是目前唯一明显有效的筹码，尤其是在压力增大且伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）薪水开始枯竭的情况下。如果要开放，应该在4周后，而不是现在。如果这是真的，那么也许幕后正在发生奇迹，政权真的准备放弃核武器和其他让步。我们拭目以待。一位伊朗高级官员告诉路透社：“巴基斯坦正在推动积极努力，以结束美国封锁并确保伊朗参与会谈。伊朗正在认真考虑参加与美国的和平会谈，但尚未做出最终决定。” - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Senior Israeli official: Difficult to see a situation where the Iranian regime agrees to a complete surrender of the nuclear project and the removal of enriched uranium tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列高级官员：很难看到伊朗政权同意完全放弃核项目并移除浓缩铀的情况。推文

text: Open Source Intel An IDF lieutenant has been indicted for smuggling a truck full of contraband into Gaza through Kerem Shalom in exchange for ~5 million shekels ($1.6M). The officer, a deputy company commander, personally escorted the truck through the crossing on September 19, ordering soldiers to let it pass. He's charged with aiding the enemy, bribery, and smuggling. The IDF says it views smuggling by military personnel as a grave risk to state security. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）一名以色列国防军（IDF）中尉因通过凯雷姆沙洛姆口岸向加沙走私一卡车违禁品而被起诉，换取了约500万谢克尔（160万美元）。这名军官是一名副连长，于9月19日亲自护送卡车通过口岸，并命令士兵放行。他被控协助敌人、受贿和走私。以色列国防军表示，将军事人员的走私行为视为对国家安全的严重威胁。推文

text: Nuno Felix Brexiters are always the worse despite living themselves in the continent. EU enters full Owellian mode, where words start to mean the opposite of what they once did.. …placing the word “DEMOCRACY” on the side of the EU HQ in Brussels—an institution now with arguably more power than any other in Europe, and one where not a single person is elected. https://twitter.com/James7Holland/status/2046182547881607423/photo/1 - James Holland tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 脱欧派总是最糟糕的，尽管他们自己住在欧洲大陆。欧盟进入了完全的奥威尔式模式，词语开始意味着与它们曾经的意思完全相反……在布鲁塞尔欧盟总部侧面打上“民主”一词——这个机构现在拥有的权力可以说比欧洲任何其他机构都大，而且其中没有一个人是民选的。https://twitter.com/James7Holland/status/2046182547881607423/photo/1 - James Holland 推文

text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @DeItaone : 伊朗高级官员对路透社表示：伊朗正在积极审议参与与美国的和平会谈，尚未做出最终决定。推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @TheIntelFrog : 🤔 A US government jet used by the Department of Justice and FBI has filed a flight plan and is en route to Havana, Cuba. US DOJ/FBI N119NA #A04ECF as JENA324 en route from Richmond to Havana, Cuba. @sipjack1776 @LatAmMilMVMTs @FlconEYES @TheIntelFrog @LadyAstroJet @USGovJets https://twitter.com/Borrowed7Time/status/2046213313433043112/photo/1 - Johnny Gemini tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @TheIntelFrog : 🤔 一架美国政府喷气式飞机（由司法部和FBI使用）已提交飞行计划，目前正在前往古巴哈瓦那的途中。美国司法部/FBI N119NA #A04ECF 作为 JENA324 从里士满前往古巴哈瓦那。@sipjack1776 @LatAmMilMVMTs @FlconEYES @TheIntelFrog @LadyAstroJet @USGovJets https://twitter.com/Borrowed7Time/status/2046213313433043112/photo/1 - Johnny Gemini 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : U.S. Vice President JD Vance will attend the next round of Iran talks in Pakistan along with Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and the President’s son-in-law Jared Kushner, the White House has told CNN, after President Trump told ABC News that Vance would not be attempting the talks in Islamabad. In response to the conflicting messages over the U.S. delegation, a White House official said: “things changed.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender : 白宫告诉美国有线电视新闻网（CNN），美国副总统万斯（JD Vance）将与特使史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和总统女婿贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）一起参加在巴基斯坦举行的下一轮伊朗会谈。此前特朗普总统告诉美国广播公司新闻（ABC News），万斯不会参加在伊斯兰堡的会谈。针对美国代表团信息冲突的问题，一位白宫官员表示：“情况发生了变化。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Judiciary Chief: "Iran will not compromise on its legitimate demands and policies." - IRNA https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046215969186414681/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Ali Moussa Jaber, commander of Hezbollah's Bint Jbeil sector was ELIMINATED. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046215449130451345/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese Industry Minister Joe El-Khoury: "Lebanon must accept Israel's existence and shift from a culture of war to a culture of peace. Israel has no expansionist agenda toward Lebanon." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046214838255296565/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）黎巴嫩工业部长乔·埃尔-库里（Joe El-Khoury）：“黎巴嫩必须接受以色列的存在，并从战争文化转向和平文化。以色列对黎巴嫩没有扩张主义议程。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046214838255296565/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Fars News has released fresh footage of the safe shipping route in the Strait of Hormuz. All transit proceeds under full authorization of the Islamic Republic of Iran. Inbound ships enter the Persian Gulf between Larak and Qeshm islands, while outbound vessels exit south of Larak. This is a secure corridor — passage is strictly permitted by Iran. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 法尔斯通讯社发布了霍尔木兹海峡安全航运路线的最新画面。所有过境运输均在伊朗伊斯兰共和国的全面授权下进行。入境船只在拉拉克岛和格什姆岛之间进入波斯湾，而出境船只则从拉拉克岛以南驶出。这是一条安全走廊——通行严格由伊朗许可。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷Reuters: Pakistani Army Chief Munir told U.S. President Trump that the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz was a hurdle to peace talks resuming. Trump responded by saying that he would consider Munir's advice. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The Hill: U.S. President Trump denied that Pakistani Army Chief Munir had recommended anything in terms of the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also disagreed with U.S. Energy Secretary Wright's assessment that gas prices might not drop until next year. “No, I think he’s wrong on that. Totally wrong." He continued that gas prices will begin to fall as soon as the situation with Iran is over. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷路透社：巴基斯坦陆军参谋长穆尼尔告诉美国总统特朗普，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁是恢复和平谈判的障碍。特朗普回应称，他会考虑穆尼尔的建议。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 国会山报：美国总统特朗普否认巴基斯坦陆军参谋长穆尼尔就封锁霍尔木兹海峡一事提出过任何建议。特朗普还不同意美国能源部长赖特关于油价可能要到明年才会下跌的评估。“不，我认为他在这一点上错了。完全错了。”他继续表示，一旦伊朗局势结束，油价就会开始下跌。 @wfwitness

text: 🇰🇼 BREAKING! Kuwait Petroleum Corporation has declared force majeure on all crude oil and refined product shipments after Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz made exports impossible. KPC CEO Sheikh Nawaf al-Sabah called the situation "beyond catastrophic," warning it will trigger a domino effect across the global economy. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇰🇼 突发！科威特石油公司宣布，由于伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁导致出口无法进行，该公司已对所有原油和成品油运输宣布不可抗力。科威特石油公司首席执行官纳瓦夫·萨巴赫亲王称局势“极其灾难性”，并警告称这将引发全球经济的连锁反应。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 The United Arab Emirates has dismantled a alleged organisation that was planning to destabilise "national security and unity." Investigations allegedly revealed the cell’s links to Iran’s “Wilayat al‑Faqih” and to "extremist ideologies." Members allegedly held secret meetings inside and outside the UAE to "recruit young Emiratis, collect funds illegally, and incite against the state’s foreign and domestic policies." The group allegedly also planned to carry out systematic "terrorist acts." A list of 27 alleged suspects was published. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 阿拉伯联合酋长国捣毁了一个涉嫌计划破坏“国家安全与统一”的组织。调查显示，该组织与伊朗的“法基赫监护”以及“极端主义意识形态”有关联。成员涉嫌在阿联酋境内外举行秘密会议，以“招募年轻的阿联酋人、非法筹集资金，并煽动反对国家的内外政策”。该组织还涉嫌计划实施系统的“恐怖主义行为”。一份包含27名涉案嫌疑人的名单已被公布。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Anti-Hamas police forces were ambushed earlier today in Khan Younis, southern Gaza. They had originally arrived in the area of the Abu Hamid roundabout where they reportedly distributed cigarettes and money to crowds of locals. Moments later, they were ambushed and their vehicle struck by an RPG (media 2). The number of casualties from the confrontation is unknown as of time of writing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 今天早些时候，反哈马斯警察部队在加沙南部的汗尤尼斯遭到伏击。他们最初抵达阿布哈米德环岛地区，据报道在那里向当地民众分发香烟和金钱。片刻之后，他们遭到伏击，车辆被火箭推进榴弹（RPG）击中（媒体2）。截至发稿时，冲突造成的伤亡人数尚不清楚。 @wfwitness

text: 🇧🇾 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 President of Belarus, Aleksandr Lukashenko: The war in Iran has shown us two things. Firstly, that the United States is not as powerful as expected. Secondly, that people in the Islamic world are willing to sacrifice their lives — unlike me 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇧🇾 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 白俄罗斯总统亚历山大·卢卡申科：伊朗战争向我们展示了两件事。首先，美国并不像预期的那样强大。其次，伊斯兰世界的人民愿意牺牲生命——这与我不同 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇪🇪🇱🇻🇱🇹❌🇸🇰 The three Baltic swamplands have once again denied airspace passage to the plane of Slovakian officials headed by Prime Minister Robert Fico who plan to attend the May 9th victory Day parade in Moscow. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Foreign Minister is of course happy with closing the airspace to Robert Fico, as long as it remains open for their drones. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇪🇪🇱🇻🇱🇹❌🇸🇰 三个波罗的海沼泽国再次拒绝了斯洛伐克官员飞机的领空通行权，这些官员原计划前往莫斯科参加5月9日的胜利日阅兵。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇦 乌克兰外交部长当然对向罗伯特·菲佐关闭领空感到高兴，只要这片领空对他们的无人机保持开放即可。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇪🇪 🇱🇻 🇱🇹 ❌ 🇸🇰 The three Baltic swamplands have once again denied airspace passage to the plane of Slovakian officials headed by Prime Minister Robert Fico who plan to attend the May 9th victory Day parade in Moscow. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇪 🇱🇻 🇱🇹 ❌ 🇸🇰 三个波罗的海沼泽国再次拒绝了斯洛伐克官员飞机的领空通行权，这些官员原计划前往莫斯科参加5月9日的胜利日阅兵。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) CCTV footage has been released showing a Russian Kinzhal air-launched ballistic missile impacting the ground without detonating somewhere in Ukraine. The missile was reportedly intercepted by the Ukrainian strategic-level electronic warfare system "Lima." According to Cascade Systems, a Ukrainian defence company which developed the EW system, "Lima" has been responsible for the downing of at least 26 Kinzhal missiles since the beginning of 2026. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）发布了闭路电视录像，显示一枚俄罗斯“匕首”空射弹道导弹在乌克兰某地撞击地面但未爆炸。据报道，该导弹被乌克兰战略级电子战系统“利马”（Lima）拦截。据开发该电子战系统的乌克兰国防公司Cascade Systems称，自2026年初以来，“利马”已负责击落了至少26枚“匕首”导弹。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah parliamentary representative Hassan Fadlallah: "No one, either in Lebanon or abroad, will be able to disarm Hezbollah." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046212258162774431/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）黎巴嫩议会代表哈桑·法德拉拉（Hassan Fadlallah）：“无论是黎巴嫩国内还是国外，没有人能够解除真主党的武装。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046212258162774431/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Reason 10k for mo rejoining….. If being "brainwashed by Brussels" means young Erasmus Brits speaking new languages, falling in love and discovering their own beautiful continent like we could - aka 𝒏𝒐𝒕 becoming the narrow-minded oinks that read and write this kind of headline 👇 then 𝐛𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐭 𝐨𝐧 ! https://twitter.com/AlexTaylorNews/status/2046185056788488457/photo/1 - Alex Taylor tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 重新加入的第1万个理由……如果“被布鲁塞尔洗脑”意味着年轻的英国伊拉斯谟学生能说新语言、坠入爱河并像我们曾经那样发现自己美丽的洲——也就是“不”成为那种阅读并撰写此类标题的狭隘猪猡 👇 那么，放马过来吧！ https://twitter.com/AlexTaylorNews/status/2046185056788488457/photo/1 - Alex Taylor 推文

text: Open Source Intel The mixed signals from Tehran point to a deeper issue. This is not just messaging, it reflects a fragmented power structure pulling in different directions. Iran does not operate under a single authority. Power is split between clerical leadership, political institutions, and the IRGC, which often acts independently. What we’re seeing is a system under pressure, with competing factions signaling different paths, negotiation or escalation, with no clear consensus at the top. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）德黑兰发出的混合信号指向了一个更深层次的问题。这不仅仅是信息传递，它反映了一个向不同方向拉扯的碎片化权力结构。伊朗并非在单一权威下运作。权力在神职领导层、政治机构和经常独立行动的伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）之间分配。我们所看到的是一个处于压力下的系统，相互竞争的派系发出了不同的路径信号，无论是谈判还是升级，高层都没有达成明确的共识。推文

text: OSINTdefender Some context on recent reports from Iraq regarding the Iraqi government and competing U.S.-Iranian interests. Iraq-U.S. Dynamic: https://x.com/defensebulletin/status/2023988321802711522?s=46 Comment: U.S.-Iraq-Iran Dynamic (Image via ISW update) 🧵 So the U.S.-Sudani dynamic is actually seriously underreported on. Sudani has long touted his “ability” to keep Iranian-backed militias in check to U.S. decision-makers as a reason for sustained U.S. support for his current role. 1/ - John M. Larrier tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 关于伊拉克政府与美伊利益冲突的近期报道的一些背景。伊拉克-美国动态：https://x.com/defensebulletin/status/2023988321802711522?s=46 评论：美-伊-伊动态（图片来自ISW更新）🧵 实际上，美国与苏达尼（Sudani）之间的动态被严重低估了。苏达尼长期以来一直向美国决策者吹嘘他有“能力”控制伊朗支持的民兵，以此作为美国持续支持他目前角色的理由。1/ - John M. Larrier 推文
